title: bolbitis bradeorum
intro: Bolbitis bradeorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Brade's netted spleenwort, a type of fern. Traditionally, Bolbitis bradeorum has been used in folk medicine in Brazil for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Bolbitis bradeorum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
